author: jdthomas24
description: Custom Hubitat driver for SmartThings Zigbee motion sensors with local processing and battery reporting.
releaseNotes: v1.7.6 - Removed presence detection which was causing devices to stop reporting. Removed lastCheckin, zigbeeHealth, and missedCheckins attributes. Battery voltage curve tightened to 5% increments for cleaner reporting. Temperature events fully suppressed when disabled. General cleanup.
